asset.title: Sheet Undo
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates the spreadsheet cell editing and undo functionality within the NodeRoom environment, showing real-time synchronization and versioned history updates.

featureClarity.evidence: The video clearly shows editing a cell and then clicking the undo button to revert the change.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the entire flow: empty cell, user input, commit, and subsequent undo action.

visualDesign.evidence: Consistent dark-themed UI with clear panel boundaries, though the layout is dense.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with NodeRoom's spreadsheet and room trace concepts.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture with real-time state updates and interactive elements.

legibility.evidence: Captions are highly legible, though some spreadsheet cell values are small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly relevant to financial and collaborative spreadsheet workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the UI interaction and version history updates without simulation.

defects.observed: Spreadsheet cell text and headers are small and slightly difficult to read at standard preview sizes.
defects.fix: Increase the default zoom level of the spreadsheet component during recording.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Easily edit cells and safely undo changes in a multiplayer-safe, version-controlled spreadsheet environment.
